fields.title: Single Image 3D Reconstruction
fields.abstract: This project presents a comprehensive framework for generating and editing 3D assets from a single image, combining multi-view diffusion models, neural radiance representations, and vision-language understanding. The system addresses the fundamental challenge of 3D reconstruction from 2D images—an inherently ill-posed problem due to depth ambiguity and occluded geometry—by leveraging recent advances in generative AI, particularly large-scale diffusion priors and vision-language models.
fields.problem_statement: Traditional 3D reconstruction requires multi-view imagery, depth sensors, or manual modeling—limiting accessibility for casual users and rapid prototyping scenarios. While recent diffusion-based approaches have enabled 3D generation from single images, they remain slow (often taking tens of minutes per object) and offer limited control over editing or refinement.
fields.institution: Tribhuvan University, Institute of Engineering, Pulchowk Campus
fields.department: Department of Electronics and Computer Engineering

fields.title: Develop Multi-View Diffusion Pipeline
fields.description: Design an optimization-based reconstruction pipeline using DreamGaussian and Zero-1-to-3++ to generate geometrically consistent multi-view images from a single input.

fields.title: Integrate Fast Feedforward Generation
fields.description: Incorporate Hunyuan3D-1.0 for rapid single-shot 3D reconstruction, reducing generation time from 45+ minutes to under 25 seconds while maintaining quality.

fields.title: Enable Language-Guided Editing
fields.description: Develop a feedforward editing pipeline using Qwen2-VL and Qwen2.5-Coder to support natural language-guided 3D asset modifications.

fields.title: Comprehensive Evaluation Framework
fields.description: Establish comprehensive quality and speed benchmarks comparing both pipelines across diverse object categories.

fields.name: Python 3.10+
fields.description: Primary development language for all pipeline components

fields.name: PyTorch 2.0
fields.description: Deep learning framework with CUDA acceleration

fields.name: Hunyuan3D-1.0
fields.description: Tencent's feedforward 3D generation model

fields.name: Qwen2-VL
fields.description: Vision-language model for understanding and editing

fields.name: DreamGaussian
fields.description: Optimization-based 3D Gaussian generation

fields.name: Docker
fields.description: Containerization for reproducible deployment

fields.name: NVIDIA A100 40GB
fields.description: High-memory GPU for model inference

fields.title: Background Removal
fields.description: Automatic subject isolation using Segment-Anything-style segmentation

fields.title: Multi-View Generation
fields.description: Generate 6+ consistent views using Zero-1-to-3++ diffusion

fields.title: Gaussian Initialization
fields.description: Initialize 3D Gaussian point cloud from multi-view depth estimation

fields.title: SDS Optimization
fields.description: Refine Gaussians using Score Distillation Sampling loss

fields.title: Mesh Extraction
fields.description: Extract mesh geometry from optimized Gaussian representation

fields.title: Single Image Input
fields.description: Generate complete 3D models from just one photograph - no multi-view capture or depth sensors required.

fields.title: 108x Faster Generation
fields.description: Feedforward pipeline generates 3D models in ~25 seconds compared to 45+ minutes for optimization-based methods.

fields.title: Natural Language Editing
fields.description: Modify 3D assets using simple text instructions like 'make it red' or 'add wooden texture'.

fields.title: Multi-Format Export
fields.description: Export to industry-standard formats including OBJ, GLB, GLTF, and PLY for use in any 3D software.

fields.title: Real-Time Preview
fields.description: Gaussian splatting enables 70% faster rendering for immediate visual feedback.

fields.title: Automatic Background Removal
fields.description: AI-powered segmentation automatically isolates subjects from complex backgrounds.

fields.title: Feedforward Speed
fields.description: Faster than optimization-based methods (25 sec vs 45+ min)

fields.title: Rendering Speed
fields.description: Faster real-time preview with Gaussian splatting

fields.title: Iteration Reduction
fields.description: Fewer optimization iterations with staged approach

fields.title: Edit Speed
fields.description: Faster than iterative editing methods

fields.title: Hybrid Pipeline Integration
fields.description: Unified interface enabling seamless transition between feedforward initialization and optimization-based refinement.

fields.title: Part-Level Editing
fields.description: 3D semantic segmentation using PartNet for precise part-specific edits while preserving other regions.

fields.title: Model Compression
fields.description: INT8/INT4 quantization and knowledge distillation to reduce memory by 50-70% for consumer GPUs.

fields.title: Web-Based Interface
fields.description: Browser-based editing with WebGPU-powered Gaussian splatting preview for accessible deployment.

fields.title: High GPU Memory Requirements
fields.description: Full pipeline requires 40GB+ VRAM for optimal performance, limiting accessibility on consumer hardware.

fields.title: Quality vs Speed Trade-off
fields.description: Feedforward pipeline sacrifices some geometric detail for speed compared to optimization-based approach.

fields.title: Single Object Focus
fields.description: Current pipeline handles single isolated objects; complex scenes with multiple objects not yet supported.

fields.title: Literature Survey & Requirements Analysis
fields.description: Comprehensive review of existing 3D reconstruction methods, identification of research gaps, and requirement specification.

fields.title: Algorithm Design
fields.description: Selection and integration of DreamGaussian, Zero-1-to-3++, Hunyuan3D-1.0, and Qwen2-VL components.

fields.title: Implementation
fields.description: Development of both optimization-based and feedforward pipelines with modular architecture.

fields.title: Testing & Evaluation
fields.description: Comprehensive benchmarking across quality metrics, speed measurements, and user studies.
